prompt: Create a coherent 4x4 raster south-facing alternate attack for Pendula, 16 ordered frames showing a wind-up, bronze gear sweep and contained teal-white slash arc. Preserve the existing character design, keep the character and effects inside the cell with safe padding, use a cyan chroma-key background, do not include a bomb or any explosive object, and do not integrate into runtime.

tool.name: image_gen
tool.productionVersion: v2 atlas/preview rebuilt from current discrete frames

frames.order: frame-00..frame-15; neutral, wind-up, gear sweep, slash arc, recovery and loop

validation.cyanSpill: no visible cyan-key spill or halo in contact sheet/preview
validation.attackSafety: no bomb or explosive object appears in any frame

grok.summary: Worker audited the candidate and attempted atlas repair, then exited with code 1 before a final verdict. The original atlases were preserved as WIP; a separate v2 atlas/preview was rebuilt locally from the current discrete frames and independently validated.

origin: Internal candidate generated for the Bomba PvP animation lab with integrated image_gen and internal Champion reference; no external pack or download.
license: Internal project source; candidate only; not approved for final Champion distribution.
